items.suggested_narrower_wording: Document only the clinician-assessed referral, clinician, arrang supported by the cited section; do not add document.
items.review_reason: safety-critical wording or item category; source supports narrower wording than the full item

UAE_applicability.statement: No direct UAE applicability is established; this international source requires UAE clinician review before application.
